name: Slow Cooked Turkey Breast with Creamy Sauce/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Place turkey breast skin side up in a 5-quart slow cooker.
2. Combine soup, bouillon or wine and seasonings (rosemary, thyme, garlic powder, paprika) and pour over turkey breast.
3. Cover and cook on high setting for 1 hour.
4. Turn to low setting and cook for 6 to 7 more hours, or until the internal temperature of the breast reaches 170°F.
5. Slice and serve with creamy sauce:
- Pour drippings into a large liquid measuring cup.
- Spoon fat into a saucepan.
- Remove any remaining fat from the drippings.
- To the fat, add enough milk to make 3 cupfuls.
- Blend flour into the fat.
- Gradually add the liquid and seasonings (tarragon, salt, pepper).
- Stir and cook over medium heat for 8 to 10 minutes, or until thickened into a smooth sauce.
